summary.en: A framework for measuring Explore work by evidence strength, learning velocity, risk reduction, and portfolio decisions instead of mature-business KPIs too early.
summary.zh: 一套衡量探索型创新的框架：用证据强度、学习速度、风险下降和组合决策，而不是过早套用成熟业务 KPI。

sources.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley · 2020
David J. Bland & Alexander Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019

note.en: Main source for measuring Explore portfolios with evidence, risk, and portfolio movement rather than early revenue certainty.
note.zh: 用证据、风险和组合移动衡量探索组合，而不是过早要求收入确定性的主要来源。

note.en: Experiment design source for evidence strength, pass/fail criteria, and learning from falsifiable tests.
note.zh: 实验设计来源，支撑证据强度、通过/失败标准和可证伪学习。
